programme.title: Shop on TV
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: WhatsApp Obsession: The Murder of Stephanie Hansen
programme.desc: Documentary. When 39-year-old Stephanie Hansen was found brutally murdered in her London home in December 2022, detectives uncovered a shocking story.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Celebrity Sabotage
programme.desc: Hilarious reality game show that sees a whole host of celebrities cause absolute chaos to win money for the unsuspecting contestants of totally fake TV shows! Guz Khan guest stars.

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: News, current affairs and lively debate.

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Lorraine Kelly presents a topical mix of entertainment, discussion and showbiz glamour as well as the latest fashion, food and celebrity gossip.

programme.title: This Morning
programme.desc: Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: Join the Loose Women panellists as they interview celebrity guests and discuss the day's most topical issues, from current affairs to celebrity gossip and the latest showbiz news.

programme.title: ITV Lunchtime News
programme.desc: The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: David's at Leeds United Football Club, James gets a red car over some footy caricature, Alison get revved up over some toys, and antiques from Shanghai tickle Tim.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Three sets of friends battle it out in this edition - Marta and Shane from Dursley, Ann and Joyce from West Yorkshire, and David and Sumbul from St Albans and Durham.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as four strangers - Erika from Oldham, Tom from East Sussex, Kim from Leamington Spa and Mark from Macclesfield - take on a Chaser.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programme.title: For the Love of Dogs with Alison Hammond
programme.desc: Alison meets an excitable spaniel with a serious knee issue, a frustrated crossbreed desperate to use his nose, and helps teach sign language to a Staffy.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Jacob finally comes clean to Sarah. Dawn makes a confession to Moira. Paddy's anxious.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: The police question their suspect's movements, Melanie piles the pressure onto Will, David shares his evidence with Kit, and another resident deletes some incriminating footage.

programme.title: A Taste for Murder
programme.desc: When Joe investigates the death of a tourist found at the bottom of a cliff, a baking lesson from Elena leads to the discovery of a clue that blows the case wide open.

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Peston
programme.desc: Political interview programme hosted by the ITV News Political Editor Robert Peston, who provides viewers with an intelligent and lively approach to politics.

programme.title: The Assembly
programme.desc: Nicola Sturgeon has the grilling of a lifetime from neurodivergent interviewers. Why did she separate from her husband? Who does she most loathe in politics? Nothing is off limits.

programme.title: Shop on TV
programme.desc: Teleshopping.

programme.title: Holiday Havoc: Where Should You Go? Tonight
programme.desc: As rising costs and global turmoil create uncertainty, Charlotte Hawkins reports on what the changing holiday market means for your next getaway.

programme.title: The Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Graham makes a surprise visit to the triumphant alliance with a game-changing decision, and a friendly village BBQ explodes into a shouting match when tensions boil over.

programme.title: How to Clean Up for Cash
programme.desc: Josie and the gang help Tim box up and value his girlfriend Sally's lifetime of collections behind her back. Can she part with her possessions and take the cash.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV
programme.desc: Your daily escape designed to calm the mind and encourage relaxation and reflection.

programme.title: Good Morning Britain
programme.desc: News, current affairs and lively debate.

programme.title: Lorraine
programme.desc: Lorraine Kelly presents a topical mix of entertainment, discussion and showbiz glamour as well as the latest fashion, food and celebrity gossip.

programme.desc: Magazine show with news and topical items, celebrity guests, expert advice, real-life stories, competitions and a mix of cookery, health, beauty, lifestyle and more.

programme.title: Loose Women
programme.desc: Join the Loose Women panellists as they interview celebrity guests and discuss the day's most topical issues, from current affairs to celebrity gossip and the latest showbiz news.

programme.title: ITV Lunchtime News
programme.desc: The latest headlines from around the world at lunchtime with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents, all of which are followed by a national weather forecast.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: Dickinson's Real Deal
programme.desc: In Llangollen, David and his dealers set up shop and Jan Keyne uses the power of ice cream to sway a deal, while Alison Chapman gets served up some silver.

programme.title: Lingo
programme.desc: Trying to Lingo all the way are cousins Danny and Alison from London and Cambridge, Andy with his son Dave from Dundee, and married couple Sue and Jane from Hebden Bridge.

programme.title: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Ben Shephard hosts the quiz show in which three players take on an extraordinary machine in the hope of winning a cash jackpot.

programme.title: The Chase
programme.desc: Bradley Walsh hosts as Ajay originally from Birmingham, Maniseng from Surrey, Jayne from Hertfordshire and Ben from London come together as a team to take on a Chaser.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: ITV Evening News
programme.desc: National and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents in the UK and around the world, plus a focus on the stories that matter to you.

programme.title: Cashing In on the Elderly: Who to Trust? Tonight
programme.desc: Ruth Dodsworth reports on elderly people falling victim to economic abuse from both professional and family carers, and how they can protect themselves.

programme.title: Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sarah urges Jacob to stand up to his bully. Joe makes a promise. Mandy's heartbroken over the closure of the salon.

programme.title: Coronation Street
programme.desc: Hope pushes Daniel's buttons at school, Todd confides his anger to George, and a seemingly innocent photograph reveals a hidden presence at the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Long Lost Family
programme.desc: A mum who recently had cancer looks for the baby she gave up as a teenager, and a woman who was donor-conceived seeks answers to her many questions.

programme.title: ITV News at Ten
programme.desc: ITV News provides a fresh perspective on the major stories of the day with national and international news with reports and analysis from ITV's Correspondents.

programme.title: ITV News London
programme.desc: The latest news and weather from London and the South East.

programme.title: The Neighbourhood
programme.desc: Two households come under fire at the third removal, and another realises they must go against their friendships and vote tactically. The final new family is secretly introduced.

programme.title: Batman Begins
programme.desc: Action crime drama film reboot starring Christian Bale and Michael Caine, 2005. A playboy begins a fight to free his home city from corruption after training in an Asian prison.
